toast.couldNotReachPage: Could not reach the page to replace text
settings.title: Settings
settings.whyKey: Why do I need my own API key?
settings.keyP1: This extension connects directly to AI providers using your API key. There is no middleman server, no account to create, and no data shared with anyone other than the AI provider you choose.
settings.keyP2: Proofreader is a free, open-source side project with no sponsorship or third-party funding. AI APIs charge per token, so bundling a shared key would mean either charging you a subscription or running out of budget quickly. By using your own key, you stay in full control of your usage, costs, and data.
settings.keyP3: The good news: proofreading uses very few tokens. A typical request costs a fraction of a cent. As of {period}, here's how each provider handles billing:
settings.keyFooter: I make no money from the AI integration. Even where billing details are required, your actual token usage for proofreading will be extremely low. Check each provider's current pricing — the details above reflect what was available in {period}.
settings.provider.gemini: Google (Gemini) — offers a free tier with generous rate limits. No billing details required. Proofreading will almost certainly stay within the free allowance.
settings.provider.openai: OpenAI (ChatGPT) — no free API tier. Requires billing details, but proofreading costs are negligible.
settings.provider.claude: Anthropic (Claude) — no free API tier. Requires a prepaid credit purchase. Actual proofreading costs are very low.
settings.provider.grok: xAI (Grok) — may offer promotional credits for new accounts. Check their site for current offers. Proofreading costs are very low.
settings.contextMenuDesc: Show Proofread options in the context menu
settings.autoShowDesc: Show auto-proofread toggle on the main page
settings.autoPasteDesc: Proofread immediately when text is pasted
settings.autoTypeDesc: Proofread after a pause in typing
settings.autoWarning: Auto-proofreading on typing will use more tokens and may increase your API costs. Use with a reasonable delay.
settings.donation.intro: Hi, I'm {name} — a developer from the UK. I built this extension for myself and figured others might find it useful too.
settings.donation.ask: If it's saved you a few minutes, a coffee would make my day.
settings.about.p1: Thanks for using Proofreader! This is a free, open-source side project built and maintained in my spare time. There are no ads, no tracking, and no data collection — just a simple tool that does one thing well.
settings.about.p2: If you run into issues, have feature ideas, or want to contribute, the project is on GitHub. Bug reports, pull requests, and feedback are all welcome.
settings.languageNote: Translations were done with AI and may not be fully accurate.
styles.title: Manage Styles
styles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This can't be undone.
form.name: Name
form.promptPlaceholder:
e.g. Fix grammar and spelling only — preserve the original tone and style.

or: Rewrite in a professional tone suitable for a business email. Tighten any loose phrasing.
form.thinkingDesc: Controls how much each AI thinks before responding. Higher values may improve quality but take longer. Set per provider so it's ready regardless of which one you use.
form.spellingLocaleDesc: Appends a spelling convention instruction to your prompt. Useful for controlling colour vs color, realise vs realize, and similar regional differences.
form.markdownDesc: If the response contains code blocks or other markdown, the output will be rendered with formatting and per-block copy buttons.
form.errorDuplicate: A style with this name already exists
settings.celebrateDesc: Show a small celebration when your text needs no changes
demo.title: Try it out — {limit} sample requests included
demo.description: These samples use a shared API key so you can see how Proofreader works. It's a bit slower than using your own key. Proofreader is completely free — just add your own API key for the full experience.
demo.limitReachedDesc: Add your own API key to keep using Proofreader — it's completely free. You just need a key from any supported provider.
demo.connectProvider: Add an API key to get started
demo.connectProviderDesc: Proofreader is free and open source. Just add an API key from Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI. Your key stays on your machine — nothing is sent anywhere else.
history.title: History
history.empty: No history yet. Your proofreading sessions will appear here.
history.clearConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete all {count} items. This can't be undone.
history.enabledDesc: Store a log of your proofreading sessions locally
history.disableWillClear: You have {count} saved items. Disabling history will permanently delete them.
incognito.enable: Incognito mode — this session won't be saved
incognito.active: Incognito mode — this session won't be saved to history
